g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
[later pages until a match or exhaustion]
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with follow-up GetRouteTable calls until the resource is gone or not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
Move the route table compartment before reconciling route rules or tags.
Resubmit the full desired route-rule list when semantic drift exists.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
- Later-page name matches must keep using the resolved OCID for later
- Partial OCI-side application of an already-submitted full route-rule
list remains outside the modeled guarantee.
- Matching route-rule lists must skip no-op writes.
- Differing lists converge only after whole-list resubmission.
